versions.version_description: This version is adapted to standard tuning.

tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.version_description: It's just capo on 3 and Em C B7 the whole way through.

content:
[Intro]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Dear future husband,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
Here's a few things[/tab]
[tab]                                 [ch]F[/ch]
You'll need to know if you wanna be[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
My one and only all my life[/tab]


[Verse 1]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Take me on a date[/tab]

I deserve it babe
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
And don't forget the flowers every anniversary[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
'Cause if you'll treat me right[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
I'll be the perfect wife[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Buying groceries[/tab]

Buy-buying what you need
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
You got that 9 to 5[/tab]

But, baby, so do I
[tab][ch]Am[/ch] 
So don't be thinking I'll be home and baking apple pies[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
I never learned to cook[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
But I can write a hook[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Sing along with me[/tab]

Sing-sing along with me (hey)


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]
You gotta know how to treat me like a lady[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
Even when I'm acting crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Tell me everything's alright[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Dear future husband,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]                                        [ch]F[/ch]
Here's a few things you'll need to know if you want to be[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]G[/ch]           [ch]C[/ch]
My one and only all my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Dear future husband,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Am[/ch]
If you wanna get that special lovin'[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]F[/ch]         [ch]G[/ch]              [ch]C[/ch]
Tell me I'm beautiful each and every night[/tab]


[Verse 2]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]
After every fight[/tab]

Just apologize
[tab][ch]Am[/ch]
And maybe then I'll let you try and rock my body right[/tab]
[tab][ch]F[/ch]
Even if I was wrong[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]
You know I'm never wrong[/tab]
[tab][ch]C[/ch]
Why disagree?[/tab]

Why, why disagree?


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]C[/ch]                                     [ch]Am[/ch]
You gotta know how to treat me like a lady[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]F[/ch]
Even when I'm acting crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]G[/ch]                    [ch]C[/ch]
Tell me everything's alright[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Dear future husband,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Here's a few things[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Gb[/ch]
You'll need to know if you want to be[/tab]
[tab]           [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Db[/ch]
My one and only all my life (hey, baby)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Dear future husband,[/tab]
[tab]              [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Make time for me[/tab]

Don't leave me lonely
[tab]               [ch]Gb[/ch]             [ch]Ab[/ch]               [ch]Db[/ch]
And know we'll never see your family more than mine[/tab]


[Bridge]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
I'll be sleeping on the left side of the bed (hey)[/tab]
[tab][ch]Bbm[/ch]
Open doors for me and you may get some kisses[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]      
Don't have a dirty mind[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]
Just be a classy guy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Buy me a ring[/tab]

Buy-buy me a ring, babe


[Pre-Chorus]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]                                    [ch]Bbm[/ch]
You gotta know how to treat me like a lady[/tab]
[tab]                     [ch]Gb[/ch]
Even when I'm acting crazy[/tab]
[tab][ch]Ab[/ch]                   [ch]Db[/ch]
Tell me everything's alright[/tab]


[Chorus]

[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Dear future husband,[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Bbm[/ch]
Here's a few things[/tab]
[tab]                                   [ch]Gb[/ch]
You'll need to know if you want to be[/tab]
[tab]             [ch]Ab[/ch]          [ch]Db[/ch]
My one and only all my life[/tab]
[tab][ch]Db[/ch]
Dear future husband,[/tab]
[tab]               [ch]Bbm[/ch]
If you wanna get that special loving[/tab]
[tab]            [ch]Gb[/ch]        [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Db[/ch]
Tell me I'm beautiful each and every night[/tab]
[tab][ch]Gb[/ch]              [ch]Ab[/ch]             [ch]Db[/ch]
Future husband, better love me right[/tab]
